nodes.label: UsageEvent ledger (authoritative billing record)
nodes.rationale: Deliberate split with MLflow: MLflow is traces/analytics, UsageEvent is the authoritative billing record and source for budget enforcement — both written from the same post-call hook. Streams metered chunk by chunk with estimation when the provider reports no usage.

nodes.label: Budget (per-team pre-call enforcement, 402)
nodes.rationale: Enforced pre-call in CompletionService because it must gate the call; over-limit returns 402 Payment Required. Open item: the enforcement read is still an indexed SUM per request, not a running counter; per-key budgets and block-vs-alert not implemented.

nodes.label: In-memory Burst Reservation (admitted-but-unsettled)
nodes.rationale: The gate counts a per-process reservation (estimated prompt + requested max_tokens ceiling x n choices, released at settlement) so a burst of concurrent requests cannot all pass under a nearly-exhausted limit. Computed from the sanitized request so client max_tokens/n are already clamped and cannot poison the gate. Residual overshoot: in-flight requests complete, no-max-tokens requests reserve only the prompt estimate, and the reservation is per replica.

nodes.label: Outbox Reconciler (pending_usage_event retry)
nodes.rationale: Durable outbox so billing survives transient DB failures: dead-lettered events are retried into usage_event idempotently by a background reconciler, giving at-least-once capture.
